root.sql:
SELECT pka_mem_newmem.fp_member_name(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.academic_salary, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.working_date, sc_mem_m_app_work_info.salary_id, sc_mem_m_app_share.share_monthly, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no, sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as apply_date_tdate, TRUNC( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_install_m_live(sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth,sc_mem_m_application_form.apply_date)/12 ) as age, sc_mem_m_application_form.sex, sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status, sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_name, sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.application_fee, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(select sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.description from sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position where sc_mem_m_app_work_info.group_position = sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position.group_position ) as group_pos_name --,(select sum(insurance_approve) --from sc_mem_m_app_member_insurance --where sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_member_insurance.application_form_no ) insurance_approve --, coalesce(sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_long,'ไม่ระบุ') AS position_name , (select sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_position where sc_mem_m_ucf_position.position_code = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.position_long)as position_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level.level_name , sc_mem_m_app_work_info.level_code , sc_mem_m_application_form.date_of_birth , sc_mem_m_application_form.entry_id , (select max(trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card)) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) in (select (sc_mem_m_application_form.hum_id) from sc_mem_m_application_form where sc_mem_m_application_form.approve_status = '2')) as hum_id_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card
,(select member_group_major from sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor where sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_major ) as member_group_major
,(select group_major_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor where sc_mem_m_ucf_groupmajor.member_group_major = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_major ) as group_major_name FROM sc_mem_m_application_form cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_prename cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group cross join sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type left join sc_mem_m_app_work_info on sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_work_info.application_form_no left join sc_mem_m_membership_registered on sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no left join sc_mem_m_app_share on sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no = sc_mem_m_app_share.application_form_no left join sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type on sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code left join sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level on sc_mem_m_app_work_info.level_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_salary_level.level_code WHERE ( sc_mem_m_application_form.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_application_form.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.mem_type ) /*WHERE*/
